name: L-6 aggregator --emit-fields surfaces pattern_id evidence_count organizations_count tier1_count as a JSON line on stderr
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"abc","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":1},{"org":"stripe","tier":1},{"org":"va","tier":2}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json --emit-fields 2>err.txt && grep -q '"pattern_id":"abc"' err.txt && grep -q '"evidence_count":3' err.txt && echo emitted 1>&2
